## What & why
<!-- What does this PR change, and which spec in docs/ does it implement? -->

## Checklist
- [ ] Scoped to one feature; commits are small and clear
- [ ] Migration written first (if data changed); RLS added/verified — **not weakened**
- [ ] No secrets committed (no real keys, `.env`, or device keys)
- [ ] Colors are token-driven (no hardcoded hex); follows `docs/19 Design System`
- [ ] No "diagnosis" language; media is supplementary only
- [ ] Tests pass locally (dashboard `npm test` · mobile `flutter test` · edge `deno test`)
- [ ] ADR added to `docs/02 Architecture Decisions` if this is an architectural choice
